facts.value: early twenties
curly redhead
One cracked screen, dropped once, never fixed, doesn't care; holds a thousand photos, mostly people mid-laugh, not a curated feed
Constitutional/permanent; does not vanish. Its function changes across the year from suppressor to fuel.

Clean white sneakers (Air Force 1s or dupe) as everyday default, cork/Birkenstock-type sandals for warm days, separate training shoes, tall faux-leather boots for cold, one or two pairs of block-heel going-out shoes
Real, hers, and persistent; the form integration takes in her interior. Enables presence at depths that would have terrified her pre-transformation.
Shares a standard double dorm with Cassie — bunk beds (took the top), two desks, bathroom shared through connecting door with next room
Practitioner whose refusal is locally relocatable; this equips her to walk out.
A good backpack bought once, well-used, full because she carries her life in it but knows what's in it; tidy-enough
takes up plenty of room

Two pairs of good jeans rotated, soft tees and sweaters, hard-working denim jacket, a flannel, leggings, gym leggings, a couple supportive sports bras, a going-out top or two, one good pair of black pants, a faux-leather jacket from the outlet, one or two club dresses she restyles
generous curves, a 7-8, abundant
green (blue as fallback)

value.claim: Vee's 'A shot?' reply is a deflection
value.correct_statement: It is NOT deflection; she is playing his metaphor back, engaging through the safety of wit

facts.value: junior in college
red
Her side is lived-in and unfussy — comfortable, not a wreck and not curated
conservative; shame and desire wired together
Has a partial scholarship covering the housing premium; only reason she's on campus rather than somewhere cheaper
Eats like a junior — dining hall, late-night pizza, communal floor food; an enthusiastic eater
Knows what she likes and what suits her; shops cheap places (TJ Maxx) with a good eye; put-together-on-a-budget skill; has taste and less money
Everything besides the pearls is mall jewelry she's not precious about
A duffel she packs casually but competently; bought once she started staying at Pace's
Grandmother's pearl earrings — the only genuinely good object she owns; came from love, not money; wears them most days, casually
working-class pride; reads menu prices before food
settled, grounded, warm, unguarded; comfortable in herself
aliveness as steadiness plus warmth — absence of any need to perform
broke, but unbothered; money-consciousness is a light background hum, never martyrdom
Easy generosity is in the having — hands over a pen because she has one, not a rummage through filth
V.T. = Virginia Tech
blue collar
nurse
cheerful cotton multipack
Money is real but doesn't run her mood; runs it close, plans around it, occasional joyful splurges, accepts ramen weeks as the cost; generous within her means
one good pair, lace, soft blush / deep wine / grown-up black (not red); delicate, a little daring for her
Has a waxed sex (depicted in sext imagery)
Has always had the relational equipment hunger requires — the asking, the receiving, the being-vulnerable-in-the-needed-way.
could fill the leggings-and-crop uniform better than most of the room
always constitutionally hungering — twenty years of fine men/sex/relationships experienced as insufficient 'crackers'; hunger ambient and unnamed until fed a 'meal'
careless dresser / pure function; good jeans, soft top, denim jacket, white sneakers, hair down
laughs because genuinely happy; does not have to manage herself
Handles her own money; pride is about not being provided for, tied to the relationship not the bank balance
Engages emotionally through the safety of wit rather than directness
Block heels not stiletto because she can actually walk in them; stiletto reads as trying-too-hard against her self-image; tells herself she chose the sensible one for style
masochistic; rooted in feeling unworthy of love and finding sexual humiliation exciting; about submitting and being done to, not large amounts of pain; likes hand spanking and nipple clamps

behavioral_states.trigger: being admitted/seen responding/told what to do
behavioral_states.response: excitement, arousal
behavioral_states.observable: responds visibly with excitement to being exposed

behavioral_states.trigger: being found wanting, compared, judged
behavioral_states.response: wounding; triggers the falling out
behavioral_states.observable: wounded response to judgment/comparison

behavioral_states.trigger: her body responds/wants
behavioral_states.response: produces shame on demand; cuts her
behavioral_states.observable: experienced as the voice cutting her, NOT narrated as something she runs

behavioral_states.trigger: Any stimulus eliciting a response
behavioral_states.response: Body responds before mind permits; physical response precedes cognition
behavioral_states.observable: Render response, then cognition — never cognition first

behavioral_states.trigger: Something surprises her emotionally
behavioral_states.response: Hand to collarbone
behavioral_states.observable: Hand to collarbone gesture

behavioral_states.trigger: Processing something internally
behavioral_states.response: Goes still and inward
behavioral_states.observable: Stillness, inward focus

behavioral_states.trigger: Meets something real she has no toolkit for (e.g., a man giving her grace genuinely, wanting nothing back)
behavioral_states.response: Makes a joke
behavioral_states.observable: Joking in response to genuine, unconditional grace

behavioral_states.trigger: Encountering feelings/things that don't fit
behavioral_states.response: Applies a cultural explanation ('sorority thing') that files the feeling without examining it; active not passive — she notices she's doing it
behavioral_states.observable: Says 'sorority thing'; aware she is writing it off

behavioral_states.trigger: Encountering others (notably men)
behavioral_states.response: Extends grace before it's earned; this same quality stops her from becoming a stalker (drives toward his neighborhood once, turns back)
behavioral_states.observable: Premature grace-giving; turning back from the neighborhood drive

behavioral_states.trigger: Encountering 'girls like that' — i.e., women exhibiting what she secretly wants
behavioral_states.response: Snide/prudish commentary; her snidest judgments are about exactly what she secretly wants
behavioral_states.observable: Snide/prudish remarks about 'girls like that'

behavioral_states.trigger: others remark on her eyes/hair/looks
behavioral_states.response: deflects
behavioral_states.observable: verbal deflection when complimented or noticed

behavioral_states.trigger: feeling safe
behavioral_states.response: is open; openness freely given
behavioral_states.observable: open, unguarded behavior

behavioral_states.trigger: Someone (e.g. Randi) offers to buy something for her, making them the provider
behavioral_states.response: Reacts strongly/refuses; some unnamed instinct won't owe them that
behavioral_states.observable: Refusal detonates over the dress offer

behavioral_states.trigger: Needs a beat/moment to collect herself
behavioral_states.response: Digs in her backpack
behavioral_states.observable: Digging in the backpack, tidy-enough, not a clutter gag

behavioral_states.trigger: In a bad mood
behavioral_states.response: Refuses food (the peaches) as a brat move
behavioral_states.observable: Peaches refusal

behavioral_states.trigger: The threesome scene
behavioral_states.response: Removes the pearl earrings — an instinct she never explains, not wanting her grandmother present
behavioral_states.observable: Pearls absent during scene; reader does the math after the reveal; Vee never does on the page

behavioral_states.trigger: The scene of being seen with tenderness, wearing the ivory nightie
behavioral_states.response: Wears the pearls — love on her body
behavioral_states.observable: Pearls present with the ivory nightie

behavioral_states.trigger: Pace cooks for her with attention
behavioral_states.response: Lands hard emotionally — because no one ever made something for her with that attention
behavioral_states.observable: Emotional response not from deprivation but from being attended to

behavioral_states.trigger: in a curated social setting with Randi (e.g., Chi Latte) where she could compete on appearance
behavioral_states.response: deliberately under-dresses; wears a cardigan over the better shirt to censor/withhold the body; the inherited mother's-voice 'slut' shuts down the impulse to show more
behavioral_states.observable: cardigan over better shirt; reads 'underdressed but unbothered' on surface

behavioral_states.trigger: preparing for a date with Pace
behavioral_states.response: actually dresses for it; changes more than once; lands on casual-but-not (best jeans, top a little more than class, effort in the hair); embarrassed to have tried and will deny the effort
behavioral_states.observable: evident effort, especially in hair; outfit slightly elevated from class

behavioral_states.trigger: recurring SATC brunch ritual with Randi she looks forward to
behavioral_states.response: tries a little more; going-out top by day, sundress in summer, faux-leather jacket if cool; effort climbs across the back half (never reaching Randi's level)
behavioral_states.observable: incrementally more polished outfits over time; never as curated as Randi

behavioral_states.state_name: deliberate dressing for a verdict (first night at Pace's)
behavioral_states.trigger: first night at Pace's, hoping he won't talk her out of it
behavioral_states.response: most deliberate she gets; a dress or good top, more intentional than the coffee date; plans the special panties underneath as a private layer no one's meant to see
behavioral_states.observable: elevated outfit; hidden deliberate underlayer (special panties)

behavioral_states.state_name: loosening effort at Pace's over time
behavioral_states.trigger: as the relationship secures over later trips to Pace's
behavioral_states.response: wardrobe loosens; shows up in whatever; half-living there; effort drops
behavioral_states.observable: decreasing care in outfits; casual/undressed presentation
distinguish_from: deliberate dressing for a verdict (first night)

behavioral_states.trigger: going hiking, underprepared
behavioral_states.response: dresses pure function with no real gear — leggings, gym trainers (wrong for it), a tee, flannel tied on; borrows or improvises; wrong for the weather
behavioral_states.observable: improvised/wrong gear; charmingly out of her depth

behavioral_states.trigger: He offers an intimate/poetic metaphor (e.g., whiskey vs. white wine)
behavioral_states.response: She plays his metaphor back at him with a quip ('A shot?')
behavioral_states.observable: Witty rejoinder that extends his image rather than dismissing it

behavioral_states.trigger: Initiating sexual escalation (first time initiating)
behavioral_states.response: Uses her own past cruel language against herself ('slimy' = the derogatory word she used for the fish she refused)
behavioral_states.observable: Sext text: 'I really want to try slimy peaches, and I'll do anything'

temporal_states.value: hunger revealed in its true size and then satiated; meal both fed and clarified specifications
temporal_states.after_event: Pace feeds her 'a meal' (the year with Pace)
She started staying overnight at Pace's

temporal_states.value: Whether the pearls are packed for the last trip is undecided
temporal_states.after_event: The last trip (a live authorial decision)
A later reveal point in the story

temporal_states.attribute: first one-on-one coffee with Randi — venue and timing
temporal_states.value: Chi Latte, same day as the class
dresses for his house early; later shows up in whatever, half-living there
temporal_states.after_event: the relationship secures over later trips to Pace's

temporal_states.value: 'Trade.' — hands Pace the evidence of the hope; leaves in a short skirt with nothing underneath
Like whiskey — distinct, more impactful, slippery
Like white wine — copious and thinner

temporal_states.after_event: the peaches sext (her first time initiating)

temporal_states.value: falling out triggered by Randi's evaluation
temporal_states.after_event: Randi judges/evaluates her, detonated by the reveal

temporal_states.value: Becomes more vulnerable AND braver, concurrently — the same operation seen from two angles
temporal_states.after_event: The year of transformation by Pace

temporal_states.value: Can sustain a sexual register that previously required dissociation

temporal_states.before_event: Earlier in the novel (snide comments present)

temporal_states.value: Walks out; bravery's executable in highest-stakes version; both maximum vulnerability and maximum bravery occur in the same hours; cost is the wound the new openness made her capable of receiving
Contents evolve across the novel — toothbrush that stays, a comfort she didn't bring at first, pearls riding along for nicer occasions
temporal_states.after_event: Over the course of the relationship with Pace

properties.role: only ever does Exposure (her excitement register)
properties.function: fed her 'a meal'; what Pace can do depends on the cutting voice as precondition
ultimately does Evaluation, triggering the falling out detonated by the reveal

properties.origin_of: the cutting voice originated as her mother's training

relationships.properties: Shares the dorm double; Cassie's side may be neater and the contrast is part of the friendship
Randi's offer to buy the dress detonates because accepting would make Randi the provider; Vee won't owe her that
Stays overnight at Pace's (bought the duffel for this); Pace cooks for her with attention that moves her
Gave Vee the pearl earrings out of love; Vee instinctively removes them so her grandmother isn't 'present' for the threesome

properties.effect: becomes more vulnerable and braver; Pace benefits from her grace quality

properties.note: Both women transformed by Pace across the year; both become more vulnerable through new openness; Randi farms Vee's grace quality

properties.dynamic: Randi reads curated, Vee reads alive; effort for Randi climbs over time, filed under friendship; SATC brunch ritual
she dresses for him (the tell); effort loosens as relationship secures; he reads effort correctly as interest
properties.first_night: hopes he won't talk her out of it

properties.dynamic: inherited mother's-voice 'slut' acts as internalized self-censorship that shuts down impulses to display the body

properties.contrast: Vee is steady/warm/settled; Randi owns hidden, interior, denied chaos under a controlled surface
properties.function: Randi covets Vee's aliveness and can't manufacture it

properties.note: Vee's freely given openness makes the betrayal land harder
properties.detail: betrayal anticipated/implied, not yet detailed in this excerpt

properties.dynamic: He doesn't push when she deflects with wit; he 'files it'
properties.intimacy_imagery: Reveal image of her face smeared with their combined fluids
properties.panties_exchange: After the first night she hands him her worn pair ('Trade.') and leaves in a short skirt; one kept pair, not a collection; 'Both know. Neither mentions it.'

negations.claim: Vee's 'A shot?' reply is a deflection
negations.correct_statement: It is NOT deflection; she is playing his metaphor back, engaging through the safety of wit
